_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Degrade or remove data from networks and computers
reference_document_element_description: Monitor data quality within the assigned domain, document issues, initiate remediation workflows, and track resolution to closure.
comments: NICE task intersects with WIDAI DQ domain. Task DQ-T-016 is the strongest semantic match.
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 1.8/10 (raw 0.175). Shared vocabulary: [data]. NICE-only terms [computers, degrade, networks, remove] vs WIDAI-only terms [assigned, closure, document, domain, initiate, issues] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.855 (P=0.855, R=0.856). Balanced P/R — the 8-word NICE element and 17-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (94.9%). "Degrade or remove data from networks and computers" and "Monitor data quality within the assigned domain, document issues, initiate remed" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.408 > STS 0.175 (gap +0.233). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [data] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 8.7%. Shared tokens: [data]. NICE-only: [computers, degrade, networks, remove]. WIDAI-only: [assigned, closure, document, domain, initiate, issues].
